headlines.headline: Perk: If Tatum returns, Celtics are back on top
headlines.description: Kendrick Perkins says the Boston Celtics would become the team to beat in the East if Jayson Tatum returns to team up with Jaylen Brown.

headlines.headline: Perk: There's nothing Bucks can do to convince Giannis to stay
headlines.description: Kendrick Perkins and Monica McNutt break down what team they believe Giannis Antetokounmpo will end up on next season.

headlines.headline: What's next in the scandal that has ensnared Chauncey Billups
headlines.description: After a Hall of Fame NBA career, here's what we know about Billups' connections to Mafia-affiliated poker games and illegal gambling.

headlines.headline: Hawks face the Bucks, look for 5th straight win

headlines.headline: Are the Cowboys the best fit for Maxx Crosby?
headlines.description: Peter Schrager and Jason McCourty discuss the impact Maxx Crosby could make if he were to join the Cowboys.

headlines.headline: 2026 NFL free agency updates: Signings, trades, rumors
headlines.description: NFL free agency opens with the legal negotiating window on March 9. Here are the latest re-signings, franchise tags, trades and intel.

headlines.headline: 2026 NFL combine superlatives led by Fernando Mendoza, Sonny Styles, Taylen Green
headlines.description: Speed and strength headlined the event, but personality powered the biggest impressions.

headlines.headline: Should the Colts tag Daniel Jones?
headlines.description: Jason McCourty and Adam Schefter weigh in on what would be the best option for how the Colts handle Daniel Jones as the franchise tag deadline approaches.

headlines.headline: Falcons to play in Madrid, part of NFL's international slate
headlines.description: The NFL announced Tuesday that the Falcons would be playing a game in Madrid, one of the NFL's nine international games this coming season.

headlines.headline: 2026 NFL mock drafts: Latest ESPN player, team predictions

headlines.headline: Deals we'd like to see before the 2026 NHL trade deadline
headlines.description: How many blockbusters will occur before 3 p.m. on Friday? Here are six deals we think teams should make.

headlines.headline: Kings lose 1st game since firing coach; Avs first to 40 wins
headlines.description: The Avalanche became the first NHL team with 40 wins this season, defeating the Kings, who were playing their first game since firing coach Jim Hiller on Sunday and replacing him on an interim basis with D.J. Smith.
